programs.title: Seven News With Alex Cullen
programs.desc: Join Alex Cullen for all the latest news headlines, as he kicks off Seven's Winning Arvo featuring an entertaining lineup of quiz shows and news updates every hour.

programs.title: Time Is Money
programs.desc: Sara Davies hosts the quickest quiz where contestants are given their prize money from the start but must race to keep hold of it. Only one can make the final and a chance to win big.

programs.title: Bridge Of Lies
programs.desc: Friends Rob, Diane, Glen and Dave take on the Bridge of Lies.

programs.title: The Chase
programs.desc: Four contestants go into battle against the Chaser as they try to win thousands of pounds. However, standing in the way is their common enemy, the Chaser, one of the finest quiz brains in the UK.

programs.title: Seven News At 4
programs.desc: Seven News live coverage of local, national and international news, plus sport, finance and weather updates. Go to 7NEWS.com.au today for more live updates.

programs.title: The Chase Australia
programs.desc: Hosted by Larry Emdur, The Chase is a general knowledge race where players must ensure they stay one step ahead of the Chaser, some of the finest quiz brains in Australia. The Chase is on...
